src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Timer.general_idea: Migrate servlet imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
Replace manual trace logging with Log4j 2's entry/exit tracing method.
Use Java 15+ text blocks to format multi-line HTML strings for better readability.
Restructure the generated HTML to include a navigation bar and separate static from dynamic content.
Update the HTML title and link text to reflect the current context (JSP/Jeeds).
Add class-level Javadoc and inline comments to explain the servlet's purpose and logic steps.
Migrate servlet imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
Replace manual trace logging with Log4j 2's entry/exit context logging for better stack trace visibility.
Add Javadoc and inline comments to clarify the servlet's purpose and response preparation steps.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Users.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ specifications required by modern application servers.
Update the User class import path from the old dao package to the new bean package structure.
Integrate Log4j2 for structured logging within the servlet lifecycle.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Users.general_idea: Wrap PrintWriter in a try-with-resources block to ensure proper resource handling, although response writers are typically managed by the container.
Rename the Gson instance field to follow Java naming conventions (camelCase for non-constants).
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Users.human_impl: private final Gson gson = new Gson();

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Users.general_idea: Add Javadoc and inline comments to explain the servlet's purpose and logic steps.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern containers like Tomcat 10.1.
Introduce Log4j2 for structured logging within the servlet.
Add class-level Javadoc and header comments for documentation purposes.
Change the servlet endpoint from handling POST requests to handling GET requests.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.human_impl: protected void doGet(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response)

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.general_idea: Remove password validation and conditional forwarding, simplifying the login flow to just store the user in the session.
Explicitly manage HTTP Session to store user state instead of relying on request forwarding alone.
Add entry logging to track method invocation and parameters.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
Replace javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api to align with Jakarta EE 10.
Replace javax.servlet jstl with jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl-api to align with Jakarta EE 10.
Replace taglibs-standard-impl with jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl implementation to align with Jakarta EE 10.
Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE 10.
Update Gson library to a newer version.
Update Log4j Core library to a newer version.
Update maven-war-plugin to a newer version.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore DBeaver IDE configuration directory to prevent committing local database connection settings.
Ignore Eclipse factory path configuration file to prevent committing local IDE build path settings.

- # jees

README.md.general_idea: Replace the generic 'Java EE on a Web Server' description with a specific list of technologies including Apache Tomcat 10.1, Maven 3, and Eclipse.

- Introduction to Java EE on a Web Server

README.md.general_idea: Update the documented server version from Tomcat 9 to Tomcat 10.1 to align with the Jakarta EE migration requirements.
Add documentation regarding the assumed PostgreSQL JDBC resource setup, including jar placement and context.xml configuration.
README.md.human_impl:
+ ### As JDBC resource, access to PostgreSQL is assumed
+ - The JDBC jar should be placed in Tomcat lib folder
+ - Add a resource element in context.xml with name jdbc/hron
